description: M14.3 cost-anomaly demo overlay for FINOPS_MOCK=1. Applied by azure/cost.py::_mock_rows ONLY when ANOMALY_MOCK_SPIKE is enabled, so the default mock series (and the test suite) keep their smooth baseline while the demo stack can surface a detectable spike. Spikes one resource's most-recent day so the pipeline flags a clear anomaly with an obvious top contributor.
